name: prd-workflow
description: Author, implement, and review PRDs through one evidence-backed delivery workflow.

interface.shortDescription: PRD authoring, delivery, and review as one loop.
interface.longDescription: Write executable PRDs, implement confirmed requirements, and complete Standards and Spec review before acceptance.
defaultPrompt: Use $write-prd to create a concise, verifiable product contract.
Use $implement-prd to deliver an approved PRD with acceptance evidence.
Use $review-prd-implementation to review an existing PRD implementation.
